title: geruma alba
intro: Geruma alba, also known as the White Geruma plant, is a tropical plant species belonging to the genus Geruma, native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Geruma alba include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
